title: CIA Reading Room cia-rdp82-00457r011500240008-4: CONFERENCE OF THE CHINA FARMERS' AND WORKERS' DEMOCRATIC PARTY

THIS DOCUMENT CONTAINS  INFORMATION AFFECTING THE NATIONAL DEFENSE OF THE UNITED STATES, WITHIN THE MEANING OF TITLE 18,  SECTIONS 793 AND 794, OF THE U.S. CODE, AS AMENDED. THIS IS UNEVALUATED INFORMATION In December 1951 the China Farmers' and Workers' Democratic Party (CFWDF) held its 6th National Cadre. Conference.  The Chinese'-Communist Party (CCP) United Front Department took the unusual step of sending a written speech to the conference which is summarized as follows: a.
